name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-35
title: rabbit-file spec.md missing required YAML frontmatter (self-referential policy violation)
description:
Per spec-rules.md section 3, every feature's docs/spec/spec.md MUST carry YAML frontmatter with feature, version, owner, deprecation_criterion.

.claude/features/rabbit-file/docs/spec/spec.md has NO frontmatter at all. The file opens directly with '# rabbit-file' on line 1.

By the policy's own definition ('An artifact missing any of these fields in its declared location is considered unowned'), the spec is unowned. Self-referential violation: this feature stores and lifecycles bugs/backlogs for the whole project but cannot document its own ownership.

Companion contract.md DOES carry full frontmatter — copy the same fields (feature: rabbit-file, version: 0.3.0, owner: rabbit-workflow team, deprecation_criterion: ...) into spec.md.

Add a regression test asserting all 4 required frontmatter fields exist in spec.md.
